893 UPR_DRSNG_INTRM_CD UPR_DRSNG_INTRM_CD GG0130F5 Upper body dressing (Interim Perf) CHAR 2 Indicates the resident's ability to dress and undress above the waist; including fasteners, if applicable, during the assessment period plus two previous calendar days. 06=Independent 
05=Setup or clean-up assistance 
04=Supervision or touching assistance 
03=Partial/moderate assistance 
02=Substantial/maximal assistance
